Subject: Request for Brief Extension on Contract Review Deadline

Dear [Opposing Counsel],

I hope this message finds you well. I'm writing to respectfully request a brief extension of our current contract-review deadline by one week. A few additional items have surfaced on our side that warrant a more thorough review, and a short extension would help ensure that we return a complete and considered response.

If agreeable, we would propose moving the deadline to [new date]. Please let me know at your earliest convenience whether this works on your end, or if you'd prefer to discuss an alternative timeframe. Thank you for your time and flexibility — I appreciate your understanding.

Best regards,
[Your Name]

Subject: Request for Brief Extension on Contract Review Deadline

Dear [Opposing Counsel],

I hope this message finds you well. I'm writing to respectfully request a brief extension of our current contract-review deadline by one week. A few additional items have surfaced on our side that warrant a more thorough review, and a short extension would help ensure that we return a complete and considered response.

If agreeable, we would propose moving the deadline to [new date]. Please let me know at your earliest convenience whether this works on your end, or if you'd prefer to discuss an alternative timeframe. Thank you for your time and flexibility — I appreciate your understanding.
